variants.title: Donaldson P550479 Hydraulic Inline
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550479 Hydraulic Inline is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Inline, Efficiency 1: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 100.3 mm, Inner Diameter: 41.2 mm, Length: 175.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2

variants.title: Fleetguard HF28951 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P550479
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard HF28951 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P550479
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF28951 hydraulic spin-on filter with cellulose media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Inline, Efficiency 1: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 100.3 mm, Inner Diameter: 41.2 mm, Length: 175.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2
